title: Contact | Rt Hon John Glen MP
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Rt Hon John Glen, Member of Parliament for Salisbury.
headings: h3: Rt Hon John Glen MP Always working hard for Salisbury and South Wiltshire
text_excerpt: Contact | Rt Hon John Glen MP Skip to main content Main navigation About John Glen News In Salisbury Issues In Parliament Contact Contact Leave this field blank Constituency Office 01722 323050 [email protected] Parliamentary Office House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA 020 7219 7693 [email protected] John on Facebook John on Twitter John on Instagram Please do get in touch with me using the contact details on this page. I hold surgeries on a regular basis by appointment - to find out more please contact my office. Email is my preferred method of contact; any letter correspondence can be sent to the House of Commons address. This will be screened and rerouted to my constituency office, so may take longer to be received than other forms of communication. Please note that I can only act on behalf of individuals living within my constituency, so be sure to include your home address and postcode. If you are unsure as to whether I am your MP, please use the 'Am I your MP' search on my homepage. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
